named-query.name: UserWeblogEntryStar.getByUser
named-query.query: SELECT s FROM UserWeblogEntryStar s WHERE s.user = ?1

named-query.name: UserWeblogEntryStar.getByUserAndWeblogEntry
named-query.query: SELECT s FROM UserWeblogEntryStar s WHERE s.user = ?1 AND s.weblogEntry = ?2

named-query.name: UserWeblogEntryStar.getCountByWeblogEntry
named-query.query: SELECT COUNT(s) FROM UserWeblogEntryStar s WHERE s.weblogEntry = ?1

named-query.name: UserWeblogEntryStar.getTopByStarCount
named-query.query: SELECT s.weblogEntry, COUNT(s) AS cnt FROM UserWeblogEntryStar s GROUP BY s.weblogEntry ORDER BY cnt DESC
